We-Commerce

The only e-commerce platform built specifically for direct selling.

Every e-commerce platform was built for a stranger clicking buy and leaving. Your business isn't that. It's a rep who spent three months building a relationship. A customer who finally clicked the link. A transaction that isn't just a sale — it's proof that someone's effort mattered.

Every transaction matters.

Book a Demo See how it works →
Trusted by direct selling leaders
The Problem

The problem isn't one thing. It's everything not connecting.

You know what this feels like. The payment processor doesn't talk to the commission engine. Attribution breaks and the wrong rep gets credit. A sync drops and suddenly commissions are wrong. A promo code doesn't fire because two systems have conflicting data.

Your team spends its week keeping this Frankenstein alive.

Your reps — the people your entire model depends on — quietly stop trusting the system. They share a link, someone else gets credit, and they learn a hard lesson: using the corporate platform is a risk. So they stop.

When reps stop sharing, traffic dies. When traffic dies, growth stalls. The technology was supposed to help. Instead it became the obstacle.

The system was never built for this.

All-in-one platform
Payments

Every transaction deserves to go through.

When a transaction fails in direct selling, it isn't a stranger shrugging and buying elsewhere. It's your rep's sister. The customer she spent three months nurturing. Fluid Payments is built so that transaction goes through — with cascading retries across multiple processors, decline recovery, network tokens, and a full suite of alternative payment methods for global markets.

Every transaction gets its best shot.

Learn about Fluid Payments →
Fluid Payments
fluid.app/payments
FairShare

Credit goes to the rep who showed up.

Attribution isn't a technical problem. It's a trust problem. When reps don't believe they'll get credit, they stop sharing. FairShare tracks the full customer journey — not just the last click — and ensures credit goes to the rep who actually showed up. Automatically. Every time.

Credit goes to who showed up.

Learn about FairShare →
Fluid FairShare
fluid.app/fairshare
Checkout

Built for the full complexity of direct selling commerce.

Most e-commerce platforms were built for guest checkout. About half of your transactions aren't that. Enrollments, subscriptions, logged-in orders, multi-market pricing, Order on Behalf Of — Fluid Checkout handles all of it natively. No plugins, no custom code, no workarounds.

Built for every transaction type.

Learn about Checkout →
Fluid Checkout
fluid.app/checkout

Artificial Intelligence

AI that makes your reps better — not redundant.

The "WE" in We-Commerce is not an accident. Direct selling works because real people share products with other real people they actually know and trust. That relationship is the product. You cannot automate it. You should not try.

Fluid uses AI to amplify that — not replace it. Catchups, the AI-powered assistant built into the rep App, monitors contact activity across your entire field and surfaces the right signal at the right moment.

AI-powered people. Not AI-replaced people.

The relationship is the product.

Blitz Week

Live in four days.

The biggest reason direct selling companies stay on broken platforms: they believe switching will take six months and cost everything. We built Blitz Week to prove them wrong.

Fluid launches new clients through an intensive four-day on-site engagement at our headquarters in Lehi, Utah. Your team works side-by-side with our executives, developers, and creative team. By Thursday afternoon, you have a live, production-ready platform.

From signed to live in four days.

See how Blitz Week works →
Day 1
Discovery & architecture. Your business model, comp plan, and integration requirements mapped in full.
Day 2
Build. Platform configured, payments connected, commission engine synced, storefront themed.
Day 3
Test & polish. End-to-end transaction testing, rep app setup, content migration, QA.
Day 4
Launch. Production deployment, team training, go-live. You leave with a working platform.

One platform. Every transaction.

Your reps have an advantage most brands spend millions trying to manufacture. Real people. Real relationships. Real trust. Fluid exists to unlock that advantage.

Every transaction matters.
